title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the AA genotype (two copies of the CFTR D110E variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information and CPIC guidelines indicate use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of D110E. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
